title: cyperus × weatherbianus
intro: Cyperus × weatherbianus, a hybrid plant within the Cyperaceae family, is commonly known as umbrella sedge or umbrella papyrus. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antibacterial activities, making it useful in treating various health issues such as wounds, fever, and digestive problems. The health benefits of Cyperus × weatherbianus include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory health, and supporting the immune system. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as an infusion, decoction, or tincture, and is used in herbal medicine to treat a range of conditions, including coughs, colds, and skin irritations.
